name: Southern Fried Chicken with Saute Bananas
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 cups Flour, seasoned with paprika and bay leaf
5 fluid ounces Milk or single cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Put three tablespoons of the seasoned flour on a plate and reserve the rest.
2. Rub the chicken joints with the lemon juice and cinnamon, then dip into the three tablespoons of flour so each piece is well coated.
3. Add just one-quarter inch of oil to a large frying pan with a lid and heat the oil until it is just at the point of smoking.
4. Place in the chicken pieces and brown on all sides. Turn down the heat and cover the pan. Cook for 20 minutes, turning once. When thoroughly cooked, remove the chicken to a serving dish and keep warm.
5. Slice the bananas, dust them lightly with some of the remaining seasoned flour, and sauté quickly in the hot oil. Place on the dish with the chicken.
6. Make corn fritters (separate recipe) and make the gravy.
7. Pour away the oil from the frying pan and add the last tablespoon of seasoned flour to the pan.
8. Cook, stirring until brown, then pour in the milk or cream and stir again to make a smooth gravy.
